title: Beyond the Supercycle: How Technology Is Reshaping Resources

summary.about: How automation, renewables, electric mobility and efficiency could transform demand and production for major resources.
summary.audience: Resource companies, energy ministries, investors and long-term planners.
summary.method: Models technology-adoption scenarios for oil, gas, coal, iron ore and copper through 2035.
summary.insights: Technology could unlock $900 billion–$1.6 trillion in annual savings by 2035 and cause demand for several commodities to peak.
